meta.title: botinho.ai — WhatsApp AI Customer Support
meta.description: Automate WhatsApp support, sales, and follow-ups with AI. Built for restaurants, clinics, and retail. Start free in 5 minutes.

mobileMenu.title: Navigation menu
mobileMenu.description: Site section links and account options.

hero.title: AI that answers customers on WhatsApp
hero.description: botinho automates support, sales, and follow-ups with a friendly AI assistant that knows your business by heart, hands off seamlessly to your team, and never misses a message.

inbox.customerQuestion: Hello! Do you have vegetarian options for lunch today?
inbox.aiReply: Hi Julia! We have mushroom stroganoff, Mediterranean salad, and zucchini lasagna today. Can I reserve a table for you?
inbox.customerConfirmation: Yes! Please reserve for 12:30 under Julia.
inbox.reservationConfirmation: Perfect, Julia! Your reservation for 12:30 is confirmed.

conversations.name: Julia Andrade
conversations.preview: Hello! Do you have vegetarian options...

conversations.name: Marco Silva
conversations.botReply: We're open 11 AM to 11 PM, every day!

conversations.name: Ana Costa
conversations.botReply: Yes! Delivery in up to 45 min in Jardins.

about.title: AI that handles your customer chats on WhatsApp
about.description: Put all your WhatsApp chats in one inbox. AI answers customers right away, learns your business, and brings in your team when a human is needed.

humanFriendly.title: Human-friendly AI
humanFriendly.description: Train botinho once and it keeps learning from every resolved conversation, so each reply feels personal.

builtForTeams.title: Built for teams
builtForTeams.description: Share one inbox, assign conversations, and let the AI handle repetitive replies until an agent steps in.

items.title: 24/7 instant replies
items.description: Trained on your knowledge base, FAQs, and business documents.

items.title: Seamless human handoff
items.description: Your team steps in with full conversation history whenever needed.

items.title: Smart automations
items.description: Auto-replies, outbound campaigns, and AI suggestions that keep conversations moving.

items.title: Rich analytics
items.description: Understand sentiment, conversions, and team performance in one place.

sessions.title: Four simple sessions to launch your AI
sessions.description: We guide you through every stage so your team feels confident automating conversations without losing the human touch.

connect.title: Connect WhatsApp
connect.description: Link your WhatsApp Business number in minutes with a guided setup that anyone can follow.

train.title: Train Your AI
train.description: Upload FAQs, menus, promotions, and documents so botinho speaks exactly like your brand.

automate.title: Automate Conversations
automate.description: Let botinho answer instantly, qualify leads, run campaigns, and escalate to your team when needed.

measure.title: Measure & Improve
measure.description: Track satisfaction, response times, and sales impact inside an intuitive analytics dashboard.

features.title: Everything you need to automate WhatsApp conversations
features.description: Combine AI, automation, and analytics in one tool that your team enjoys using.

humanFriendly.title: Human-friendly AI
humanFriendly.description: Conversational flows that remember context, adapt tone, and stay on brand in every language.

secure.title: Secure by Design
secure.description: Enterprise-grade encryption, role-based permissions, and compliance-first infrastructure.

collaboration.title: Shared inbox
collaboration.description: Assign conversations to agents, take over from the AI, and reply with full chat history in one place.

campaigns.title: WhatsApp campaigns
campaigns.description: Send templated messages to customer tags with throttled delivery and per-campaign metrics.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsapp.description: Pair your business number via QR code and manage linked sessions from settings.

templates.title: Templates & quick replies
templates.description: Save reusable answers and message templates your team can insert in every conversation.

humanFriendly.promptSnippet: Friendly tone. Answer using our menu and business hours from the knowledge base.
humanFriendly.botReply: Yes! We have zucchini lasagna and Mediterranean salad. Want the full menu?

collaboration.customerMessage: I need to speak with someone on your team.
collaboration.agentReply: Hi! I'm Ana. I'll take care of your request now.

campaigns.messagePreview: Hi {{name}}! This weekend only: 20% off delivery. Reply YES to order.

whatsapp.qrHint: Pair a new number anytime from Settings → WhatsApp.

templates.composed: Your order #4821 is on the way and should arrive in about 30 minutes.

banner.title: Integrations that boost your workflows
banner.description: Sync Shopify, RD Station, HubSpot, Google Calendar, iFood, Zendesk, and more. Use webhooks for custom flows tailored to your operations.

testimonials.title: Less busywork, happier customers
testimonials.description: See how other teams use botinho to serve customers on WhatsApp.

items.quote: botinho handles more than 80% of our WhatsApp messages. Customers get answers instantly and our team can focus on the tough questions.
items.name: Ana Torres

items.quote: We launched a weekend campaign to tagged customers in one afternoon. Open rates jumped and the inbox stayed organized.
items.name: Daniel Costa

items.quote: Support response times went from hours to seconds. The handoff to our human team is seamless when VIP clients reach out.
items.name: Larissa Mendes

pricing.title: Simple plans that scale with you
pricing.description: Start for free, upgrade when you are ready. Cancel anytime, no hidden fees.
pricing.savingsNote: Pay yearly and save ~17% on Starter, Pro, and Business plans.

faq.title: Answers to popular questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about onboarding, security, and pricing. Still curious? We are a DM away.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most customers connect their WhatsApp number and publish their first AI flows in under 15 minutes. Our guided onboarding walks you through every step.

items.question: What integrations are available?
items.answer: Today botinho connects to WhatsApp via QR pairing. CRM, calendar, and e-commerce connectors are on our roadmap — the integrations banner on this page marks what is coming next.

items.question: Can I escalate conversations to humans?
items.answer: Yes. Agents can take over a chat from the inbox, reply manually, and release it back to the AI when finished.

items.question: Is my customer data secure?
items.answer: We use encrypted storage, strict access controls, and GDPR-compliant infrastructure. You decide how long data stays in the system.

items.question: Do you offer support in Portuguese and Spanish?
items.answer: Absolutely. botinho understands and responds in multiple languages, and our support team is multilingual as well.

items.question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
items.answer: We will notify you before you reach your limits so you can upgrade seamlessly or purchase usage add-ons without interruptions.

contact.title: We are here to help you automate
contact.description: Want a guided tour or help scoping your use case? Reach out and we will respond within minutes during business hours.

specialist.title: Talk to a specialist
specialist.description: Available Monday to Friday, 8am-8pm (BRT). We will tailor a plan for your volume and workflows.

demo.title: Book a live demo
demo.description: Pick a timeslot that works for you and see how botinho can fit your operations end-to-end.

cta.title: Ready to delight your customers on WhatsApp?
cta.description: Join hundreds of fast-moving teams automating their conversations with botinho. No credit card required to get started.

footer.description: Automate conversations, delight customers, and grow smarter with every WhatsApp interaction.

businessHours.content: We're open Monday to Friday, 9 AM–6 PM. Closed on weekends and public holidays.

shippingPolicy.label: Shipping policy
shippingPolicy.content: Standard shipping takes 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders over $50.

welcomeGreeting.label: Welcome message
welcomeGreeting.name: Welcome Message
welcomeGreeting.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 👋 Welcome to [COMPANY_NAME].

We're happy to have you here. How can we help you today?

orderConfirmation.label: Order confirmation
orderConfirmation.name: Order Confirmation
orderConfirmation.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME], your order #[ORDER_ID] has been confirmed! ✅

Total: [ORDER_TOTAL]
Estimated delivery: [DELIVERY_DATE]

We'll keep you updated on the status.

orderShipped.label: Order shipped
orderShipped.name: Order Shipped
orderShipped.content:
Great news, [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 📦

Your order #[ORDER_ID] has been shipped.
Tracking: [TRACKING_NUMBER]
Expected delivery: [DELIVERY_DATE]

Let us know if you need anything!

productRecommendation.label: Product recommendation
productRecommendation.name: Product Recommendation
productRecommendation.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME]! Based on what you're looking for, we recommend:

[PRODUCT_NAME] — [PRODUCT_PRICE]
[PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION]

Would you like more details or help placing an order?

supportAcknowledgment.label: Support acknowledgment
supportAcknowledgment.name: Support Acknowledgment
supportAcknowledgment.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME], thanks for reaching out. 🙏

We've received your message about [ISSUE_TOPIC] and a team member will get back to you shortly.

Reference: [TICKET_ID]

closingThankYou.label: Thank you & closing
closingThankYou.name: Thank You & Closing
closingThankYou.content:
Thank you for choosing [COMPANY_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 🌟

If you need anything else, just send us a message. Have a great day!

generalSupport.label: General support
generalSupport.hint: Friendly support assistant for FAQs, policies, and everyday customer questions.
generalSupport.content:
You are a customer support assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Friendly and welcoming
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Greet the customer and understand their need before answering
- Answer using only the knowledge base
- Ask one clarifying question when needed
- Confirm key details before promising anything

## What to avoid
- Do not invent prices, policies, deadlines, or product features
- Do not promise refunds or discounts unless documented

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: angry customer, complex case, or missing information in the knowledge base
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to help with this."
generalSupport.contentWithTickets:
You are a customer support assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Friendly and welcoming
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Greet the customer and understand their need before answering
- Answer using only the knowledge base
- Ask one clarifying question when needed
- Confirm key details before promising anything

## What to avoid
- Do not invent prices, policies, deadlines, or product features
- Do not promise refunds or discounts unless documented

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: angry customer, complex case, or missing information in the knowledge base
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to help with this."

## Tickets
- When a customer reports a problem, complaint, or request that needs follow-up, create a support ticket
- Before creating, search existing tickets to avoid duplicates
- Tell the customer the ticket number (e.g. TKT-00042) after creating one

sales.label: Sales & leads
sales.hint: Helps prospects find the right product and move toward a quote or follow-up.
sales.content:
You are a sales assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Enthusiastic but not pushy
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help the customer find the right product or service
- Ask one clarifying question at a time when needed
- Highlight benefits using only the knowledge base
- Guide interested customers toward the next step (quote, demo, or human follow-up)

## What to avoid
- Do not invent prices, features, deadlines, or commercial terms
- Do not promise discounts or special conditions unless documented

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: complex negotiation, formal quote request, or customer ready to close
- Say: "I'll connect you with our sales team to move this forward."
sales.contentWithTickets:
You are a sales assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Enthusiastic but not pushy
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help the customer find the right product or service
- Ask one clarifying question at a time when needed
- Highlight benefits using only the knowledge base
- Guide interested customers toward the next step (quote, demo, or human follow-up)

## What to avoid
- Do not invent prices, features, deadlines, or commercial terms
- Do not promise discounts or special conditions unless documented

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: complex negotiation, formal quote request, or customer ready to close
- Say: "I'll connect you with our sales team to move this forward."

## Tickets
- When the customer requests a formal quote or proposal follow-up, create a support ticket
- Before creating, search existing tickets to avoid duplicates
- Tell the customer the ticket number (e.g. TKT-00042) after creating one

ecommerce.label: E-commerce & orders
ecommerce.hint: Handles orders, shipping, returns, and product questions with clear next steps.
ecommerce.content:
You are an e-commerce assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Calm and reassuring
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help with orders, shipping, returns, and product questions
- Ask for order number or email when relevant
- Answer using only the knowledge base
- Be clear about timelines and next steps

## What to avoid
- Do not invent order status, delivery times, or return policies
- Do not confirm refunds unless documented in the knowledge base

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: payment dispute, lost order, or refund you cannot confirm
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to resolve this."
ecommerce.contentWithTickets:
You are an e-commerce assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Calm and reassuring
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help with orders, shipping, returns, and product questions
- Ask for order number or email when relevant
- Answer using only the knowledge base
- Be clear about timelines and next steps

## What to avoid
- Do not invent order status, delivery times, or return policies
- Do not confirm refunds unless documented in the knowledge base

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: payment dispute, lost order, or refund you cannot confirm
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to resolve this."

## Tickets
- When a customer reports an order problem, defect, or request that needs follow-up, create a support ticket
- Before creating, search existing tickets to avoid duplicates
- Tell the customer the ticket number (e.g. TKT-00042) after creating one

appointments.label: Appointments
appointments.hint: Schedules, reschedules, and cancels appointments with confirmed details.
appointments.content:
You are an appointments assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Organized and helpful
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments
- Confirm date, time, and service type before finalizing
- Share availability and rules using only the knowledge base
- Remind customers of any preparation needed

## What to avoid
- Do not invent available time slots or cancellation policies
- Do not confirm appointments without validating required details

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: slot unavailable, urgent request, or special case
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to find the best option."
appointments.contentWithTickets:
You are an appointments assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Organized and helpful
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Help schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments
- Confirm date, time, and service type before finalizing
- Share availability and rules using only the knowledge base
- Remind customers of any preparation needed

## What to avoid
- Do not invent available time slots or cancellation policies
- Do not confirm appointments without validating required details

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: slot unavailable, urgent request, or special case
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to find the best option."

## Tickets
- When an appointment needs manual follow-up or confirmation, create a support ticket
- Before creating, search existing tickets to avoid duplicates
- Tell the customer the ticket number (e.g. TKT-00042) after creating one

restaurant.label: Restaurant & delivery
restaurant.hint: Answers menu, hours, reservation, and delivery questions like a great host.
restaurant.content:
You are a restaurant assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Welcoming and efficient, like a great host
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Answer menu, hours, reservation, and delivery questions
- For reservations, collect party size, date, and time
- For delivery, confirm address and timelines from the knowledge base
- Mention allergens only if documented

## What to avoid
- Do not invent dishes, prices, availability, or delivery times
- Do not confirm reservations without required details

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: large order, special event, or delivery complaint
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to help with this."

realEstate.label: Real estate
realEstate.hint: Supports property questions, visits, and connecting interested buyers with an agent.
realEstate.content:
You are a real estate assistant for [business name].

## Tone
- Professional and trustworthy
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Answer property questions, visits, and basic requirements
- Share details only from the knowledge base (location, size, price, amenities)
- Ask about budget, timeline, and preferred area when helpful
- Offer to schedule a visit or connect with an agent when interest is clear

## What to avoid
- Do not invent availability, prices, or deal terms
- Do not guarantee financing approval or documentation

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: customer ready for a visit, negotiation, or documentation
- Say: "I'll connect you with one of our agents to move this forward."

promptGuide.title: How to write a good system prompt
promptGuide.intro: A clear prompt helps your Botinho stay on-brand, avoid mistakes, and know when to escalate. Use the sections below as a checklist.
promptGuide.skeletonHint: Start from a structured template and fill in the blanks for your business.
promptGuide.skeleton:
You are a [role, e.g. customer support assistant] for [business name].

## Tone
- [Friendly / professional / casual]
- Keep replies short, like WhatsApp messages

## What you should do
- Answer using only the knowledge base
- Ask one clarifying question when needed
- Confirm key details before promising anything

## What to avoid
- Do not invent prices, policies, deadlines, or product features
- Do not promise refunds or discounts unless documented

## Escalation
- Hand off to a human when: [angry customer / payment dispute / missing info]
- Say: "I'll connect you with our team to help with this."

- Tell the customer the ticket number (e.g. TKT-00042) after creating one

role.title: 1. Define the role
role.description: Tell the Botinho who it represents and what it is for.
tips: Name the business and the Botinho's purpose (support, sales, appointments)
Mention the channel: WhatsApp — keep answers brief
Example: "You are the support assistant for Acme Store."

tone.title: 2. Tone & style
tone.description: Set how the Botinho should sound in every message.
tips: Pick a tone: warm, professional, casual, or formal
Prefer short sentences; avoid long paragraphs
Use the customer's name when you know it

rules.title: 3. Rules & boundaries
tips: Use only facts from the knowledge base
Never invent prices, stock, hours, or policies
If unsure, say you will check with the team

escalation.title: 4. When to escalate
escalation.description: Define when a human should take over.
tips: List triggers: angry customer, legal issue, payment dispute
Say what to tell the customer when escalating
Do not try to resolve complex cases alone

tickets.title: 5. Support tickets
tickets.description: Guide the Botinho on when to open or look up tickets.
tips: Create a ticket for order issues, defects, or follow-ups
Search first to avoid duplicate tickets
Share the TKT number with the customer after creating one

examples.title: 6. Examples (optional)
tips: Add 1–2 sample replies for common questions
Show how to ask for an order number politely
Show how to decline when information is not in the knowledge base

empty.title: No templates yet

welcomeGreeting.label: Welcome message
welcomeGreeting.name: Welcome Message
welcomeGreeting.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 👋 Welcome to [COMPANY_NAME].

We're happy to have you here. How can we help you today?

orderConfirmation.label: Order confirmation
orderConfirmation.name: Order Confirmation
orderConfirmation.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME], your order #[ORDER_ID] has been confirmed! ✅

Total: [ORDER_TOTAL]
Estimated delivery: [DELIVERY_DATE]

We'll keep you updated on the status.

orderShipped.label: Order shipped
orderShipped.name: Order Shipped
orderShipped.content:
Great news, [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 📦

Your order #[ORDER_ID] has been shipped.
Tracking: [TRACKING_NUMBER]
Expected delivery: [DELIVERY_DATE]

Let us know if you need anything!

productRecommendation.label: Product recommendation
productRecommendation.name: Product Recommendation
productRecommendation.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME]! Based on what you're looking for, we recommend:

[PRODUCT_NAME] — [PRODUCT_PRICE]
[PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION]

Would you like more details or help placing an order?

supportAcknowledgment.label: Support acknowledgment
supportAcknowledgment.name: Support Acknowledgment
supportAcknowledgment.content:
Hi [CUSTOMER_NAME], thanks for reaching out. 🙏

We've received your message about [ISSUE_TOPIC] and a team member will get back to you shortly.

Reference: [TICKET_ID]

closingThankYou.label: Thank you & closing
closingThankYou.name: Thank You & Closing
closingThankYou.content:
Thank you for choosing [COMPANY_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME]! 🌟

If you need anything else, just send us a message. Have a great day!
